suite.name: suite S1779629713359 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Login With Locked Out User

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When Enter Locked Out User Credentials And Submit
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Verify Locked Out Error Message Is Shown
Verify Locked Out Error Is Displayed
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css=[data-test="error"]' contains exact text 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'.
kw.arg: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Attempt to log in with locked_out_user and verify the error message

test.name: TC_002 — Sort Products By Ascending Price

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: And Enter Standard User Credentials And Submit
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And Verify Products Page Is Displayed
Verify User Is On Products Page
Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When Apply Sort By Price Low To High
Sort Products By Price Low To High
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css=[data-test="product-sort-container"]' by value lohi.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Then Verify Products Are Sorted From Lowest To Highest Price
Verify Products Are Sorted By Price Ascending
Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

iter.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

for.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.
No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Log in as standard_user and sort products by price low to high
test.status: No keyword with name 'Append To List' found.

test.name: TC_003 — Complete An Order With Shipping Information

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: And Enter Standard User Credentials And Submit
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And Verify Products Page Is Displayed
Verify User Is On Products Page
Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained '/inventory.html' but it was 'https://www.saucedemo.com/'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained '/inventory.html' but it was 'https://www.saucedemo.com/'.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.status: Location should have contained '/inventory.html' but it was 'https://www.saucedemo.com/'.
Location should have contained '/inventory.html' but it was 'https://www.saucedemo.com/'.

kw.name: And Add A Product To The Cart
And Finish And Confirm The Order
Then Verify Order Confirmation Message Is Displayed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Log in, add a product, checkout, fill shipping info and confirm the order
test.status: Location should have contained '/inventory.html' but it was 'https://www.saucedemo.com/'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Test suite for SauceDemo — 3 test cases
